goal: Integrate zone mode into existing 3D StudioPage editor: zone preset placement, zone dragging, required zone protection, zone properties, save zones to DB

baseline.notes: StudioPage is 3D R3F editor with Zustand store. Need to add zone-level editing on top of existing prefab editing.

items.description: Extend StudioState with zone editing actions (addZoneFromPreset, moveZone, deleteZone, swapZoneVariant, selectedZoneId)
Add Zones/Assets tab to StudioPalette with zone preset cards using ZONE_PRESET_GROUPS
Make ZoneFloor draggable in 3D (move zone + its prefabs together)
Show zone properties in StudioProperties when zone is selected (name, type, variant swap, delete)
Required zone protection - Rest and Meeting zones cannot be deleted
Extend save flow to persist zone changes to DB
Zone overlap detection with visual warning during drag/placement
